creator: kazakov@gmail.com
text:
It seems this somewhat stale bug.
It has been fixed since nss_ldap version 251
At least I could not reproduce it in version 251 and 254
( But I reproduced it in version 249)
What version are you using ?
there is a work-around
add this line to nss_ldap.conf when you use soft bind policy:
nss_connect_policy oneshot

Or better solution upgrade to current version.

Cheers,
Tyoma.
